title: Oracle Fired 30,000 People at 6 A.M. to Fund AI Data Centers
script: Oracle just completed the largest layoff in its history. On March 31st, 2026, 30,000 employees — 18 percent of the global workforce — received termination emails at 6 a.m. with no warning from HR. The cuts free up $8 billion in cash. The money goes directly to a $156 billion AI infrastructure buildout tied to OpenAI's Stargate contract. Many workers forfeited unvested stock worth hundreds of thousands. Jobs were traded for compute.
